title: Convert Principal ID to 5-digit numeric display in user profile

requirements.summary: Create a deterministic utility function that maps any Principal ID string to a consistent 5-digit number (00001–99999) using a hash-based algorithm
acceptanceCriteria: A utility function exists (e.g., in frontend/src/utils/) that accepts a Principal ID string and returns a zero-padded 5-digit string between '00001' and '99999'
The function is deterministic: the same input always produces the same output
The function handles any valid Principal ID string without errors

file_operations.description: Add a deterministic hash-based utility function that converts a Principal ID string to a zero-padded 5-digit numeric string (00001–99999). Use a simple hash algorithm (e.g., sum character codes, apply modulo 99999, add 1) to ensure the same Principal ID always produces the same 5-digit output. Export the function for use in components.

requirements.summary: Update the UserProfileSection component to display the 5-digit numeric representation of the Principal ID instead of the full Principal ID string, while preserving the copy-to-clipboard functionality for the original Principal ID
acceptanceCriteria: The user profile section shows a 5-digit number (e.g., '42817') instead of the full Principal ID string
The displayed number is zero-padded to always be exactly 5 digits
The copy-to-clipboard button copies the original full Principal ID, not the numeric representation
The 5-digit display is consistent across sessions for the same Principal ID

file_operations.description: Import the new utility function from frontend/src/utils/principals.ts. Replace the displayed Principal ID with the 5-digit numeric representation by calling the utility function. Keep the original Principal ID value for the copy-to-clipboard button so users can still copy the full Principal ID. Update the label or tooltip text to clarify that the displayed number is a shortened representation.
